# Transcrição: Upgrade_your_operating_system

- **Fonte:** Upgrade_your_operating_system
- **Duração:** 01:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:15]

I look at the human brain as a computer. This is an operating system up here, right? If you've got Windows 95, you still function, it still works, but oh man, it's hard to get through life. And then you can upgrade your operating system. And the more you update the software, the easier it is to get through life. And to me, that is the value of learning. That is the value of reading. The more you learn, the more you grow, the easier it is for you to be able to deal with certain situations. For example, starting a business was really hard for me. There were tough times there, but why was it so tough? Because I didn't have a good operating system. All I thought of was I just thought, oh, business. Yeah, I can do the thing. Oh heck, I'll start my own business. Now I'll just do the thing. And if I just keep doing the thing, well, I'll build a really successful business. No, there was Windows 95 talking. And then I upgraded to Windows XP, which is better than Windows 95. And I kind of went, oh, wow. You can't just be good at the thing. You also have to learn how to manage your time. You have to do marketing. You have to do admin. And then I got better at it. So whatever it is that you're going through, it could be adversity in your business, it could be adversity in your personal life, whatever it may be, find five books and consume them, download the information. And as you download the information, you update the operating system, you navigate that adversity with a little more ease.
